vocab.example: What is your salary expectation for this position?
vocab.example_vi: Mức lương mong muốn của bạn cho vị trí này là bao nhiêu?

vocab.example: The base salary is negotiable depending on experience.
vocab.example_vi: Lương cơ bản có thể thương lượng tùy theo kinh nghiệm.

vocab.example: Can you tell me more about the benefits package?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể cho tôi biết thêm về gói phúc lợi không?

vocab.example: The probation period usually lasts two months here.
vocab.example_vi: Thời gian thử việc ở đây thường kéo dài hai tháng.

vocab.example: Does the company offer a signing bonus for new hires?
vocab.example_vi: Công ty có thưởng khi ký hợp đồng cho nhân viên mới không?

vocab.example: I based my number on the current market rate.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đưa ra con số dựa trên mức lương thị trường hiện tại.

vocab.example: Flexible working hours are important to me.
vocab.example_vi: Giờ làm việc linh hoạt rất quan trọng với tôi.

vocab.example: The company came back with a counteroffer the next day.
vocab.example_vi: Công ty đã đưa ra đề nghị phản hồi vào ngày hôm sau.

lines.speaker: Phương (HR interviewer)
lines.text: Khoa, what is your salary expectation for this role?

lines.speaker: Khoa (candidate)
lines.text: Based on the market rate, I'm expecting around 25 million VND.

lines.speaker: Phương (HR interviewer)
lines.text: That's a bit higher than our budget, but the number is negotiable.

lines.speaker: Khoa (candidate)
lines.text: I understand. Could you also tell me about the benefits package?

lines.speaker: Phương (HR interviewer)
lines.text: Sure, we offer health insurance and a small signing bonus.

lines.speaker: Khoa (candidate)
lines.text: That sounds good. How long is the probation period here?

lines.speaker: Phương (HR interviewer)
lines.text: It's two months, at eighty-five percent of the full salary.

lines.speaker: Khoa (candidate)
lines.text: Got it. Are flexible working hours possible for this position?

lines.speaker: Phương (HR interviewer)
lines.text: Yes, and I'll also discuss your number with management soon.

lines.speaker: Khoa (candidate)
lines.text: Thank you, I really appreciate you considering my expectations.

questions.q: What is Khoa's salary expectation based on?

options: Health insurance and a signing bonus
A company car and free lunch
Stock options and a gym membership

questions.q: How long is the probation period?

shadowing: So, what exactly is your salary expectation for this position?
The base salary is negotiable depending on your experience level.
Can you tell me more about the company's benefits package?
The probation period here usually lasts about two full months.
Are flexible working hours possible for this position at all?
